title: pentanema squarrosum
intro: Pentanema squarrosum, also known as Woody Fleabane, is a perennial plant species in the Asteraceae family, characterized by its woody stems and yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Pentanema squarrosum include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems, such as colds and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in salves and creams for topical application.
